summary: Verified team invite flow fix. Backend: 12/12 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All invite/login flows working correctly. Sandro (invited team member) can login, skip onboarding, and see shared brand data.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/brands returns brands where user is owner AND team member
Backend: GET /api/brands/{brand_id} allows access for team members (not just owners)
Backend: Team invite flow works: create invite → accept → user sees brand
Backend: Admin can send invite, list pending invites, cancel invite
Backend: List team members shows owner + team members
Frontend: AcceptInvite page shows 'need login' for unauthenticated users
Frontend: AcceptInvite stores pending_invite in localStorage before redirecting to login
Frontend: After login, Sandro lands on dashboard (skips onboarding)
Frontend: Sandro can see the shared brand 'Sandro Serzedello' on dashboard
critical_code_review_comments: brands.py Line 49-76: GET /api/brands correctly queries team_members collection to include shared brands
brands.py Line 79-94: GET /api/brands/{brand_id} correctly checks both owner and team membership
team.py Line 268-281: accept_invite correctly sets onboarding_completed=True for invited users
VerifyEmail.js Line 39-47: Correctly checks localStorage for pending_invite before redirecting
AcceptInvite.js Line 33-36: Correctly clears pending_invite from localStorage after acceptance
seed_data_creation: Used existing sandro@test.com invite which was accepted. Created temporary test invite during test run (cancelled afterwards).

backend_get_brands_team_membership.details: GET /api/brands now queries team_members collection to return brands where user is a team member
backend_get_brands_team_membership.evidence: Sandro (team member) can see brand_29aafd2d6125 in GET /api/brands response

backend_get_brand_team_access.details: GET /api/brands/{brand_id} allows team members to access brand details

frontend_verify_email_redirect.details: VerifyEmail checks localStorage for pending_invite before redirecting to onboarding

frontend_accept_invite_cleanup.details: AcceptInvite clears pending_invite from localStorage after acceptance

frontend_sandro_sees_brand.details: Sandro can login and see the shared brand on dashboard
frontend_sandro_sees_brand.evidence: Screenshot shows 'Gerencie a marca Sandro Serzedello' on dashboard

context_for_next_testing_agent: Team invite flow is fully working. Sandro (sandro@test.com / Test1234!) is a team member of brand_29aafd2d6125 and can access all brand data. The fix involved: 1) Backend GET /api/brands queries team_members collection, 2) Backend accept_invite sets onboarding_completed=True, 3) Frontend VerifyEmail checks pending_invite before redirect, 4) Frontend AcceptInvite clears pending_invite.
